description:
This quiz tests and deepens your knowledge of JavaScript's native Date API, which is notoriously difficult. It covers formatting and localization, challenging developers who often rely on third-party libraries. The tone is humorous and informative, suitable for intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Date formatting, Date localization, Native Date methods
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to master the native Date class and reduce dependency on third-party libraries.
